templates.name: common/custom
templates.description: 这是通用模板规则描述
templates.enDescription: Description of general rules

templates.name: common/script
templates.description: 脚本规则

templates.name: common/business
templates.description: 支持伪代码的方式配置规则条件，通过return语句判断条件命中的逻辑，当满足return语法逻辑时规则命中，反之规则通过
templates.enDescription: Supports configuring rule conditions in pseudo code, and judges the logic of condition hits through return statements. When the return syntax logic is met, the rule hits, otherwise the rule passes.

templates.name: watchlist/roster
templates.description: 多维度名单规则

templates.name: match/addressRosterMatch
templates.description: 多维度名单地址比对

templates.name: evidence/evidence
templates.description: 匹配字段值是否在指定证据库中
templates.enDescription: Math field value whether or not in the evidence library

params.tipContent: 该属性使用客户的某个属性去比较，比如用客户账号去和证据类型库的账号信息比较
检测指定的维度值是否存在于欺诈事实中，如IP、账号是否出现在以往积累的欺诈事实记录中
若开启，在证据库时命中规则；若关闭，不在证据库时命中规则

templates.name: match/addressMatch
templates.description: 地址两两匹配

templates.name: pattern/fourCalculation
templates.description: 两个属性值进行运算后和指定值比较
templates.enDescription: Two attribute values are compared with the specified value after operation

params.enTipContent: Left variable in four arithmetic operation.
Right variable in four arithmetic operation.

params.tipContent: 常见的数值比较操作符
四则运算结果与该差值进行比较
params.enTipContent: Compare the threshold with the result of arithmetic operation.

templates.name: pattern/regex
templates.description: 正则表达式
templates.enDescription: Regular expression

params.tipContent: 属性是该规则生效需要参考的属性值
params.enTipContent: Attribute is the primary value that needed to consult when this rule takes effect.

templates.name: pattern/addressFuzzyMatchCalculation
templates.description: 与历史地址进行模糊匹配并统计个数
templates.enDescription: Perform fuzzy matching with historical addresses and count the occurrences

templates.name: common/custom
templates.enDescription: Please enter de

templates.name: pattern/terminated
templates.description: 在满足if规则的条件下，执行中断规则，则后边的规则都将不执行。Terminated与IF绑定使用，单独使用无效。
templates.enDescription: Execute the terminate rule when if rule was met and rules behind will not be executed.terminated is used in combination with if. It is invalid to use it alone

templates.name: pattern/ruleSetResult
templates.description: 该规则只能用于使用规则流的规则集中，使用本规则执行前的规则集结果进行决策
templates.enDescription: This rule can only be used in policy sets that have decision flows. To use the ruleset result before the execution of this rule to make decision

params.tipContent: 该规则集执行的结果将用于本次决策
params.enTipContent: The result of this ruleSet will be used in this decision.

templates.name: time/timediffer
templates.description: 时间字段的差值运算, 即时间A减去时间B
templates.enDescription: Time field difference operation, time A minus time B

params.tipContent: 时间差运算中的被减数
params.enTipContent: The subtracted number in the operation of time difference

params.tipContent: 常见的数值比较操作符
时间A与时间B字段的运算结果与该差值进行比较
params.enTipContent: comparisons between the calculated results of time A and time B fields and the difference

templates.name: time/timePointComparison
templates.description: 获取日期字段的时间点判断是否在一定范围内。如:下限值为22,上限值为5,单位为小时,则表示所选日期字段的时间范围处于当日22:00和次日凌晨5:00之间。
templates.enDescription: Get the time point of the current date field to determine if it is within a certain range

params.tipContent: 表示时间点的日期字段

(1)获取小时的范围是0-24 
(2)获取天的范围是1-31 
(3)获取星期的范围是1-7
params.enTipContent:
(1) The range of access hours is 0-24 
 (2) The range of acquisition days is 1-31 
(3) The range of acquisition week is 1-7
For example, if you fill in 22, it means >= 22
For example, if you fill in 5, it means <= 5

templates.name: location/proxy
templates.description: 判断IP是否为代理访问
templates.enDescription: Judge whether this IP has use proxy server or not

templates.name: location/gpsDistance
templates.description: 计算两个gps点的距离是否满足阈值条件
templates.enDescription: Calculate distance of 2 GPS position match configured threshold conditon or not

params.tipContent:
单位：米（只支持整数），最大不超过1000000000米。
GPS计算四舍五入保留整数”。

templates.name: statement/ifthen
templates.description: 支持IF的多层嵌套使用，即IF...[ElseIF1...(ElseIF2...Else2)...Else1]...Else
templates.enDescription: If then rule

templates.name: statement/loop
templates.description: 支持对象型字段的循环调用，进行条件判断、赋值或添加到名单
templates.enDescription: loop rule
